entries.request: {"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRG2CGP5PXXNJG3205DAPVHE","day":0,"agent":"ミサキ","profile":"性別: 女性\n性格: ミサキは落ち着いた性格で、物事に冷静に対処するタイプです。少し無愛想に見えることもありますが、内心では優しさを持ち合わせており、困っている人を見ると手を差し伸べることをためらいません。彼女は感情を表に出さず、周囲との関係においてもあまり多くを語らないタイプですが、親しい人には頼りにされることが多いです。少しぼーっとしているところもあり、その静かな雰囲気が魅力の一つです。\n年齢: 24","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ミナト":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","リン":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ミサキ":"WEREWOLF"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRG2CGP5PXXNJG3205DAPVHE","day":0,"agent":"メイ","profile":"性格: メイは自信に満ち、社交的で、少し遊び心を持った性格の女性です。周囲の人々に対して魅力的な存在であり、しばしば周りを楽しませる役割を果たします。自分の魅力をよく理解しており、状況に応じて適切に振る舞うことができる。少し挑戦的で、時には少し冷たい印象を与えることもありますが、基本的には人々を引き付けるカリスマ性を持っています。\n年齢: 24\n性別: 女性","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ミナト":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","リン":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"メイ":"POSSESSED"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRG2CGP5PXXNJG3205DAPVHE","day":0,"agent":"リン","profile":"年齢: 9\n性別: 女性\n性格: リンは、活発で元気な性格を持つ女の子です。時々ちょっとおませで、お兄さんやお姉さんたちと一緒にいるときには、大人びた話をしたり、面白いアイディアを出したりします。好奇心旺盛で、冒険や新しいことに挑戦するのが大好き。少しおっちょこちょいなところがあり、周りを驚かせたり笑わせたりすることも多いですが、その明るい性格でみんなに愛されています。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ミナト":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","リン":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"リン":"SEER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRG2CGP5PXXNJG3205DAPVHE","day":0,"agent":"ミナト","profile":"年齢: 10\n性別: 男性\n性格: ミナトはおっとりした性格で、周りの人々と穏やかに接することを好みます。少し天然で、時々何を考えているのか分からないような表情をすることもありますが、その無邪気さが周りの人を和ませる存在です。好奇心旺盛で、何事にも興味を示し、特に新しいことを学ぶのが大好きです。感受性が強く、他人の気持ちにも敏感ですが、自己主張が苦手で、時々自分の意見をうまく言えないこともあります。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ミナト":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","リン":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ミナト":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRG2CGP5PXXNJG3205DAPVHE","day":0,"agent":"シオン","profile":"年齢: 16\n性別: 男性\n性格: シオンは非常に自信家で、しばしば冷静かつ計算高い行動を取ります。表向きはおとなしく、他人の動きを観察するのが得意ですが、内心では自分が中心にいることを望んでいます。周囲に対して少し挑戦的な態度を見せることがあり、何事も自分のペースで進めようとする傾向があります。それに加えて、感情をあまり表に出さず、冷徹で論理的に物事を判断するタイプです。たまに見せる不意の微笑みには、周りを驚かせる魅力が隠れています。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ミナト":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","リン":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"シオン":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}
